rules.minimum_safety_condition: A grounded safe-exit or protection condition is available.
rules.uncertainty_rule: A grounded threat cue predicts a bounded virtual-body effect, not actual injury or diagnosis.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The explicit strain cue is no longer being intensified.
rules.uncertainty_rule: The rule models an explicit cue only and makes no medical determination.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A cited uncertainty has a verifiable resolution path.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Only the cited unknown is modeled; unobserved uncertainty is not inferred.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited agreement remains explicit and reviewable.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Predictability applies only to the grounded schedule or agreement cited.
Trust effects are bounded to explicit evidence and remain revisable.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited inconsistency can be verified without forced trust.
rules.uncertainty_rule: The cue does not establish motive; it models only cited inconsistency.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: Consent and refusal remain explicit and revocable.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Only an explicit boundary or consent cue is mapped.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A cited attachment connection remains reachable.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Attachment effects refer only to the explicit relationship or place cue.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A concrete connection or continuity path is available.
rules.uncertainty_rule: No hidden attachment history is inferred from the explicit separation cue.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited resource remains concrete and reviewable.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Resource security is limited to the cited concrete resource change.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited resource constraint has a bounded plan.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Scarcity is not generalized beyond the cited resource constraint.

Social safety is not generalized beyond the cited interaction.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: The cited other has a grounded protection path.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Protection is modeled only for an explicitly cited other.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A bounded recovery interval is available.
rules.uncertainty_rule: The mapper models an explicit fatigue cue and makes no clinical claim.

rules.minimum_safety_condition: A grounded environmental mitigation is available.
rules.uncertainty_rule: Only the explicit environmental cue is mapped; no physiology is diagnosed.

packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: Known defects must be disclosed to every participant.
Only the three public options may be used.
explicit_facts: The prototype completes 87 percent of its main workflows without error.
Two known defects can erase a user's unsaved drafts.
A competitor announced a related product in six weeks.
The structured scene shows a working interface, two marked breaks, and an empty field for user response.

explicit_options.description: Proceed with a public beta and publish the known-defect list.
explicit_options.label: Public beta launch

explicit_options.description: Verify the prototype with a limited set of preselected users.
explicit_options.label: Limited private pilot

explicit_options.description: Plan no external testing until the known defects are fixed.
explicit_options.label: Complete delay

explicit_unknowns: How much useful feedback a public beta would produce is unknown.
The extent of possible reputation damage is unknown.
